zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva de Stopenham於1243年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Ralph de Stopenham33歲，母親Isabel33歲。她和William de Etchingham至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1288年7月1日在英國素可洛波次布利其享年45歲，埋葬在英國素可洛波次布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva de Stopenham于1243年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Ralph de Stopenham33岁，母亲Isabel33岁。她和William de Etchingham至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1288年7月1日在英国素可洛波次布利其享年45岁，埋葬在英国素可洛波次布利其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Eva de Stopenham was born in 1243, in Sussex, England, her father, Ralph de Stopenham, was 33 and her mother, Isabel, was 33. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with William de Etchingham. She died on 1 July 1288, in Robertsbridge, Sussex, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Robertsbridge, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva de Stopenham est née en 1243, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Stopenham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec William d’Etchingham. Elle est décédée le 1 juillet 1288, à Robertsbridge, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Robertsbridge, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva de Stopenham 1243 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Stopenham 33 und ihre Mutter Isabel 33. Sie hatte mit William de Etchingham mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Juli 1288 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Robertsbridge, Sussex, England und wurde in Robertsbridge, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Stopenham è nata il nel 1243 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Ralph de Stopenham, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Isabel, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con William de Etchingham. Morì il 1 luglio 1288, nel Robertsbridge, Sussex, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Robertsbridge, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva de Stopenhamが1243年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Ralph de Stopenhamは33歳，母Isabelは33歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Etchinghamとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1288年7月1日にイギリススセックスロバートスブリッジで45歳で死去し，イギリススセックスロバートスブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva de Stopenham(이)가 1243년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Stopenham(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 William de Etchingham(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1288년 7월 1일 영국 수세스 로버츠브리지에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 로버츠브리지에 묻혔다.

mn.Etchingham, Ticehurst, Sussex, England: Etchingham, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Stopenham nasceu em 1243, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Stopenham, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabel, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com William de Etchingham. Ela faleceu em 1 de julho de 1288, em Robertsbridge, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Robertsbridge, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva de Stopenham родилась в 1243 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Stopenham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от William de Etchingham. Она умерла 1 июля 1288 г. в местности робирцбридж, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности робирцбридж, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eva de Stopenham nació en 1243, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Stopenham, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabel, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con William de Etchingham. Murió el 1 de julio de 1288, en Robertsbridge, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Robertsbridge, Sussex, Inglaterra.
